title: ANC - 6.-ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, both without selected values
scenario: ANC and Transparency modes remain OFF and Transparency is greyed out during a call when both modes were previously disabled, with a popup indicating Transparency is unavailable during call
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
3. Ensure ANC Mode is set to OFF (no value selected).
4. Ensure Transparency Mode is set to OFF (no value selected).
5. Start or join a call (e.g., Zoom, Teams, or Mobile call).
6. During the call, observe the ANC and Transparency controls in Audio Settings.
expected: During a call, when ANC is OFF and Transparency is OFF, Transparency should remain greyed out/inaccessible. Tapping the Transparency toggle should show a popup stating the option is unavailable during a call. After ending the call, both ANC and Transparency should remain OFF, and the user should be able to toggle between them normally.
